title: Universal Antique Grandfather Brass Clock Key Odd
description:
The 5 way clock key can be used to wind grandfather clocks and other antique clocks so your special clock can be both beautiful and functional. The key can also serve as a replacement or back up of original clock keys that are often lost with older antique grandfather clocks. The key is made of durable brass material and will last a lifetime. This is a great find!
